scripts.test:ark:integration: cp .env .env.test; INTEGRATION=true vitest run --config vitest.ark.integration.config.ts && rm -f .env.test
scripts.test:ark: pnpm run test:ark:unit && pnpm run test:ark:integration
scripts.test:metavault:unit: cp .env .env.test; METAVAULT=true vitest run --config vitest.metavault.unit.config.ts && rm -f .env.test
scripts.test:metavault:integration: cp .env .env.test; METAVAULT=true vitest run --config vitest.metavault.integration.config.ts && rm -f .env.test
scripts.test:metavault: cp .env .env.test; METAVAULT=true vitest run --config vitest.metavault.config.ts && rm -f .env.test
scripts.test: pnpm run test:ark && pnpm run test:metavault && pnpm run test:property
scripts.precommit: pnpm format && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
